name: MetaCortex Datacentres
brief: for 'MetaCortex Datacentres', an enterprise AI-infrastructure and colocation provider. Brand palette: deep emerald green, graphite black, cool white, with restrained copper accents. Style: architectural photography, dramatic clean lighting, vast scale, precision engineering, enterprise B2B polish. Brand text where appropriate: 'METACORTEX - Infrastructure for the intelligence age'.
logo_prompt: Design the official brand logo for 'MetaCortex Datacentres', an enterprise AI-infrastructure provider. A flat, geometric hexagonal mark suggesting a neural node or circuit core, with the wordmark 'METACORTEX' beneath it. Palette: deep emerald green mark, graphite black text, cool white background. Clean corporate vector style, centered, no photography, no extra text.

scenes.hero: hero image: a vast, immaculate datacenter aisle with rows of server racks receding into the distance, subtle emerald accent lighting
scenes.instagram: Instagram post: dramatic close-up of a liquid-cooled server rack with branded panel, engineering-precision aesthetic
scenes.x_banner: X/Twitter banner: sweeping wide shot of the datacenter facility exterior at dusk, architectural lines
scenes.story: Story/Reel card: vertical shot of an engineer with a tablet walking a server aisle, scale and calm competence
scenes.email_header: email header: slim banner of fiber-optic cabling in perfect order with negative space for text
scenes.appstore: App Store screenshot: the infrastructure monitoring app UI on a phone - uptime, power, cooling dashboards
scenes.og_card: OG preview card: link-share thumbnail of the facility with the brand lockup and room for a headline
scenes.print_ad: print ad: magazine full-page composition, the facility rendered as monumental architecture with generous margins
